---
title: "The Reuther Lab"
hide-title: true
listing:
  id: news
  type: table
  fields: [title, date]
  sort: date desc
  contents:
    - "docs/blog/posts/*/index.qmd"
    - "docs/scholarship/papers/*.qmd"
    - "docs/scholarship/presentations/*.qmd"
  sort-ui: false
  max-items: 8
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  feed: true
  table-hover: true
  table-striped: true
---

```{=html}
<div class="column-body">
  <section class="lab-hero" aria-label="Lab introduction">
    <div class="lab-hero-main">
      <img
        src="/assets/logokeefe/logokeefe-social-256.webp"
        alt="The Reuther Lab logo: embroidered patch with a lightbulb and question mark"
        class="lab-logo"
        width="180"
        height="180"
      >
      <div class="lab-hero-copy">
        <h1 class="lab-title">The Reuther Lab</h1>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="lab-hero-credit">Photo by Aniket Deole on <a href="https://unsplash.com/photos/T-tOgjWZ0fQ?utm_source=keefereuther&amp;utm_medium=referral">Unsplash</a></p>
  </section>

  <div class="lab-intro">
    <p><strong>We build open-source AI tools for undergraduate biology and study how students and instructors actually use them.</strong></p>
    <p>Our work runs on two tracks: building generative AI tools that support active learning, and studying what actually happens when those tools land in real classrooms. We also teach experimental design, statistics, and data science — the craft of turning biological questions into rigorous answers. Explore the <a href="/docs/blog/index.html">blog</a> for recent writing, or <a href="/docs/about/contact/index.html">get in touch</a> about a workshop, collaboration, or help setting up one of the tools in your course.</p>
  </div>

  <nav class="lab-nav-grid" aria-label="Site sections">
    <a href="/docs/genai/tools/index.html" class="lab-nav-card">
      <span class="lab-nav-card-title">AI Tools and Curricular Design</span>
      <span class="lab-nav-card-desc">Resources for instructors interested in AI literacy</span>
    </a>
    <a href="/docs/teaching/index.html" class="lab-nav-card">
      <span class="lab-nav-card-title">Teaching</span>
      <span class="lab-nav-card-desc">Courses and materials</span>
    </a>
    <a href="/docs/about/contact/index.html" class="lab-nav-card">
      <span class="lab-nav-card-title">Contact</span>
      <span class="lab-nav-card-desc">Workshops and collaboration</span>
    </a>
  </nav>
</div>
```

## Recent Posts & Publications

::: {#news}
:::
